title: Welwitschiina macrophylla
intro: There is not enough information available about the Welwitschiina macrophylla.
taxonomy: Welwitschiina macrophylla is a member of the family Cuscutaceae, which belongs to the order Solanales. This classification makes it a type of parasitic flowering plant. The genus Welwitschiina is a small group of plants that are native to southern Africa. The family Cuscutaceae is characterized by its parasitic and hemiparasitic species, which obtain nutrients from other plants. Welwitschiina macrophylla's classification reflects its unique parasitic nature.
